hero.subtitle: From registration to certification. ensemble unites all the tools a professional congress needs. AI-powered. Real-time. Swiss-made.
hero.ctaNote: No obligation · Personal consultation · In 30 minutes

platform.title: One platform. Everything included.
platform.subtitle: Not 10 different tools, but a single system for the entire congress lifecycle.

swiss.title: Swiss Made. Swiss Hosted. Swiss Values.
swiss.card1Desc: GDPR and nDSG compliant. All data hosted in Switzerland and the EU. No third-country transfers.
swiss.card2Desc: No cookies, no tracking. Privacy-friendly analytics exclusively via Cloudflare Web Analytics.
swiss.card3Desc: Auth.js authentication, rate limiting, audit logs, and end-to-end encryption for sensitive data.
swiss.card4Desc: API-first design, WebSocket real-time communication, and modular extensibility for any requirement.

cta.headline: Ready for your next congress?
cta.subtitle: Start for free and experience how ensemble transforms your congress.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Ensemble by Nord · Made in Switzerland

emptyState.noSessionsDesc: Create the first session for this congress.

funktionen.title: All Features
funktionen.subtitle: Everything your congress needs. From registration to certification.
funktionen.ctaSubtitle: Book a personal demo and see how ensemble simplifies your congress.

dragDrop.name: Drag-and-Drop Schedule Planning
dragDrop.description: Create and organize your schedule intuitively with drag-and-drop in a visual time grid.

multiTrack.name: Multi-Track Parallel Sessions
multiTrack.description: Manage any number of parallel tracks and room assignments in a single view.

conflicts.name: Conflict Detection
conflicts.description: Automatic detection of room and speaker conflicts during schedule planning.

personalSchedule.name: Personal Schedule
personalSchedule.description: Attendees create their individual schedule with bookmarks and reminders.

ical.name: iCal Export and Calendar Sync
ical.description: Export sessions directly to Google Calendar, Outlook, or Apple Calendar.

sessionTypes.name: Session Types
sessionTypes.description: Keynote, Workshop, Poster, Panel, Live Surgery, and more configurable session formats.

formBuilder.name: Online Registration with Form Builder
formBuilder.description: Create custom registration forms with configurable fields and validation.

ticketTypes.name: Multiple Ticket Types and Price Tiers
ticketTypes.description: Standard, VIP, Virtual, Student, and more. Define any ticket categories with individual pricing.

earlyBird.name: Early Bird Pricing with Countdown
earlyBird.description: Automatic price switch after the early bird deadline with a live countdown.

groupReg.name: Group Registration via CSV
groupReg.description: Register entire delegations via CSV import with automatic confirmation.

waitlist.name: Waitlist with Auto-Promotion
waitlist.description: Automatic waitlist management with notification when spots become available.

payment.name: Payment Processing
payment.description: Integration with Stripe and NordPay for secure online payments in CHF and EUR.

transcription.name: Real-time Transcription
transcription.description: Automatic transcription of all presentations in real time with Whisper AI.

qa.name: Live Q&A with Upvoting
qa.description: Attendees ask questions, the community votes. The best questions rise to the top.

polls.name: Interactive Polls and Word Clouds
polls.description: Live polls, multiple choice, and free-text word clouds during sessions.

streaming.name: Live Streaming
streaming.description: HLS and WebRTC-based streaming for remote attendees in the highest quality.

reactions.name: Real-time Emoji Reactions
reactions.description: Instant attendee feedback with emoji reactions that float across the screen.

ratings.name: Session Ratings
ratings.description: Detailed ratings after each session for quality assurance and speaker feedback.

ble.name: BLE Beacon Indoor Positioning
ble.description: Precise real-time positioning inside the venue using Bluetooth Low Energy beacons.

floorplan.name: SVG Floor Plan with Rooms
floorplan.description: Interactive floor plan with room details, floor switching, and zoom.

pathfinding.name: Dijkstra Pathfinding
pathfinding.description: Shortest path to the next session, room, or booth with an animated route.

occupancy.name: Real-time Room Occupancy
occupancy.description: Live display of each room's capacity. See instantly where seats are available.

checkin.name: Automatic Session Check-in
checkin.description: Attendance is automatically recorded via beacon when entering a room.

accessible.name: Accessible Routes
accessible.description: Wheelchair-accessible navigation with elevators and step-free paths.

nfc.name: NFC Badge Contact Exchange
nfc.description: Exchange contact information by simply tapping NFC badges together.

qr.name: QR Code Fallback
qr.description: For devices without NFC: scan a QR code for instant contact exchange.

nearby.name: People Nearby
nearby.description: See who is currently near you. Ideal for spontaneous networking.

directory.name: Attendee Directory
directory.description: Searchable directory of all attendees with profile and organization.

dm.name: Direct Messages
dm.description: Send private messages to other attendees, directly from their profile or the directory.

vcard.name: Contact Export (vCard)
vcard.description: Export your collected contacts as a vCard file for Outlook and CRM systems.

realtime.name: Real-time Chat
realtime.description: Instant messaging via Cloudflare Durable Objects with under 50ms latency worldwide.

channels.name: Group and Session Channels
channels.description: Automatic chat channels for every session, every track, and custom groups.

directMessages.name: Direct Messages
directMessages.description: Private 1:1 communication between attendees, speakers, and organizers.

files.name: File and Image Sharing
files.description: Share presentations, images, and documents directly in the chat.

moderation.name: Moderation Tools
moderation.description: Report, mute, and moderate messages, both automatically and manually.

push.name: Push Notifications
push.description: Web push and in-app notifications for new messages and announcements.

directory.name: Exhibitor Directory with Profiles
directory.description: Exhibitors present themselves with logo, description, products, and contact details.

leads.name: Lead Capture via NFC/QR
leads.description: Capture visitor contacts at the booth. Badge scan with notes and rating.

catalogs.name: Product Catalogs
catalogs.description: Digital product catalogs with images, descriptions, and download links.

sponsorTiers.name: Sponsor Visibility (Tiers)
sponsorTiers.description: Gold, Silver, Bronze. Sponsors receive tiered visibility throughout the entire app.

floorplan.name: Floor Plan with Booth Numbers
floorplan.description: Interactive exhibition floor plan with booth numbers, categories, and wayfinding.

leadExport.name: Lead Export as CSV
leadExport.description: Export all captured contacts as CSV, ready for CRM import.

rag.name: RAG Knowledge Base
rag.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation across all congress content, abstracts, and presentations.

search.name: Search Congress Knowledge
search.description: Ask questions in natural language and receive precise answers from congress knowledge.

summaries.name: AI Summaries
summaries.description: Automatic summaries of sessions, presentations, and entire congress days.

translation.name: Multilingual Translation
translation.description: AI-powered real-time translation of content into German, French, Italian, and English.

recommendations.name: Smart Recommendations
recommendations.description: Personalized session recommendations based on interests and attendance patterns.

citations.name: Source Citations
citations.description: Every AI answer with source references, linked directly to abstracts and sessions.

points.name: Points System for Engagement
points.description: Points for check-ins, questions, networking, polls, and other congress activities.

leaderboard.name: Leaderboards
leaderboard.description: Daily and overall leaderboards foster friendly competition.

achievements.name: Achievements and Badges
achievements.description: Digital badges for milestones like First Question, Networker, or Early Bird.

referral.name: Referral Program
referral.description: Attendees refer colleagues, with tracking and bonus points for successful registrations.

tiers.name: Reward Tiers
tiers.description: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond. Rising tiers with exclusive rewards.

teams.name: Team Competitions
teams.description: Departments or clinics compete as teams and earn points together.

creditTypes.name: Multiple Credit Types
creditTypes.description: Support for FMH, ACCME, EAU, and other accreditation systems.

attendance.name: Automatic Attendance Verification
attendance.description: BLE beacons and session check-in verify attendance automatically.

evaluations.name: Session Evaluations
evaluations.description: Mandatory evaluations after each session as a prerequisite for CME credits.

certificates.name: Certificate Generation (PDF)
certificates.description: Automatic creation of continuing education certificates as PDF with QR code.

qrVerify.name: QR Verification Code
qrVerify.description: Every certificate contains a QR code for authenticity verification.

dashboard.name: Continuing Education Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of all attended sessions, earned credits, and certificates.

gallery.name: Photo Gallery with Lightbox
gallery.description: Shared photo gallery for attendees and organizers with full-screen view.

poster.name: Poster Sessions (ePoster)
poster.description: Digital poster exhibition with zoom, voting, and comments.

articles.name: Article and Paper Upload
articles.description: Submit and browse scientific contributions with keyword tags.

onDemand.name: On-Demand Recordings
onDemand.description: Watch missed sessions as video-on-demand, even after the congress.

podcam.name: PodCam Video Interviews
podcam.description: Record short video interviews with speakers and attendees on-site.

library.name: Document Library
library.description: Central repository for presentations, handouts, and supplementary materials.

wizard.name: Congress Setup Wizard
wizard.description: Step-by-step wizard guides you through setting up a new congress.

attendees.name: Attendee Management
attendees.description: Overview, search, filter, and export of all attendees with registration status.

badges.name: Badge Design and Printing
badges.description: Design and print name badges with QR/NFC code and custom layout.

finance.name: Financial Overview
finance.description: Revenue, expenses, and payment status at a glance, including CSV export.

analytics.name: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Attendee numbers, session popularity, engagement metrics, and trends.

audit.name: Audit Logs and Security
audit.description: Complete logging of all changes for compliance and traceability.
